description: You are a customs broker assistant. Your client needs the Harmonized Tariff Schedule (HTS) classification and duty rates for three products to be imported into the US: ceramic coffee mugs (undecorated stoneware, from China), men's cotton t-shirts (knitted, from Vietnam), and lithium-ion rechargeable batteries (from South Korea). Using the USITC HTS Search database (https://hts.usitc.gov/) and US Customs and Border Protection (https://www.cbp.gov/), create a reference document at /home/ga/Desktop/tariff_classification.txt containing the HTS subheading code (e.g., 1234.56.78), General Rate of Duty, HTS Chapter number, and source URLs for each product
